## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt` / `cargo clippy` / `cargo test` pass (backend changes)
- [ ] `npm run lint` and `npm run build` pass (frontend changes)
- [ ] No secrets or private data in the diff
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
